title: I was getting coffee
description: A solitary figure lingers beneath a café staircase, the mundane ritual of waiting for coffee rendered tender through loose, gestural strokes of saturated colour.

title: The Singapore Sky
description: Pastel-hued apartment blocks rise against a luminous Singapore sky, the city's vertical geometry softened into something almost atmospheric and wistful.

title: 第二束玫瑰
description: A second bouquet of roses erupts in spiralling strokes of pink and green, each petal a small act of controlled chaos that tips into pure chromatic joy.

title: Untitled
description: An unsettling proximity forces the viewer into the tension between mouth and hand, the brushwork raw and visceral against a bruised, dark ground.

title: Reverie
description: A dreaming figure dissolves into a field of lotus blooms, her flowing hair merging with a wash of soft colour in a reverie that hovers between sketch and vision.

title: Bloom
description: A cascading tree in full bloom commands the canvas, its drooping branches alive with impasto flecks of pink, white, and gold against a deep indigo ground.

title: Night Market
description: A vendor sits quietly amid the abundance of a night market, warm lamplight catching the textures of produce and the stillness of a face in repose.
